zh.Horestan Castle, Horsley, Derbyshire, E: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾霍斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Byron於大約1178年出生在英國越可爾克雷頓時，他的父親Roger de Buron22歲，母親Nichola de Verdun14歲。他和Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton至少有5個兒子。他去世於1221年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.Horestan Castle, Horsley, Derbyshire, E: 英国英格兰德比夏爾霍斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Byron于大约1178年出生在英国越可爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Roger de Buron22岁，母亲Nichola de Verdun14岁。他和Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton至少有5个儿子。他去世于1221年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Byron was born about 1178, in Clayton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Roger de Buron, was 22 and his mother, Nichola de Verdun, was 14. He had at least 5 sons with Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. He died in 1221, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Byron est né environ 1178, à Clayton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Buron, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Nichola de Verdun, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. Il est décédé en 1221, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Byron um 1178 in Clayton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Buron 22 und seine Mutter Nichola de Verdun 14. Er hatte mit Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1221 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Byron è nato il circa 1178 nel Clayton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Buron, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Nichola de Verdun, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. Morì nel 1221, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Byronが約1178年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Roger de Buronは22歳，母Nichola de Verdunは14歳であった。彼はCecilia  Cecelia Claytonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1221年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Byron(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 요르크실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Buron(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola de Verdun(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1221년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Byron nasceu aproximadamente 1178, em Clayton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Buron, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Nichola de Verdun, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. Ele faleceu em 1221, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Byron родился около 1178 г. в местности клеитон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Buron было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Nichola de Verdun, 14. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. Он умер в 1221 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Byron nació aproximadamente 1178, en Clayton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Buron, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Nichola de Verdun, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton. Murió en 1221, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
